problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: If CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
